attributes.action: Give Young People in Kent a Safe Place in Mental health crisis.
attributes.additional_details: There are crisis houses for adults but none specifically for young people. I want local services to fund and open a safe, short-term crisis house for under-18s in Kent, with trained staff and 24/7 support, so young people have somewhere calm and supportive to go without needing hospital admission.
attributes.background: Kent has no crisis houses for under 18s. Young people Only have the option of hospital. They need a safe comfortable place to feel safe.

rejection.details: This is a local issue, responsibility for which lies with local authorities/charities, not the Government.
